retry_reason: The put operations are unconditional and always succeed; once called, the caller must not use the nvmem_device again. Retrying would constitute a double-put leading to use-after-free.
contract_summary: This function releases one reference to an nvmem_device by decrementing its device reference count, module reference count, and internal kref. It is the counterpart to a corresponding get operation and must be called exactly once for every acquired reference. After calling __nvmem_device_put, the caller must not access the nvmem_device pointer, as the object may be freed. The function is unconditional, does not return a value, and cannot be retried on failure.

judge.reason: The entire function consists solely of reference-count decrement operations (put_device, module_put, kref_put) on the nvmem_device. There is no other business logic; its primary purpose is to release all references held by the caller.
